understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to reach the gem tile marked '+' in each level. The player must navigate through the level avoiding spikes, using movement and click actions efficiently within limited turns and attempts.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement (MOVE_LEFT, MOVE_RIGHT) shifts the player horizontally; gravity pulls the player downward after moving. CLICK removes certain tiles at a specified position, which can cause the player to fall due to gravity if supporting tiles are removed. Spikes are deadly hazards that end the attempt if touched. Each level has 2 attempts, each with 50 turns. Failed attempts restart the level.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to reach the gem tile marked '+' in each level. The player must navigate through the level avoiding spikes, using movement and click actions efficiently within limited turns and attempts.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement (MOVE_LEFT, MOVE_RIGHT) shifts the player horizontally; gravity pulls the player downward after moving. CLICK removes certain tiles at a specified position, which can cause the player to fall due to gravity if supporting tiles are removed. Spikes are deadly hazards that end the attempt if touched. Each level has 2 attempts, each with 50 turns. Failed attempts restart the level.
